subject: FW: Daily Mail story
body:
Am I mentioned at all in this story of you versus Rothstien? If so what does it say about me and should I respond?

FACEBOOK <https://www.facebook.com/TerraMarProject>
TWITTER <http://twitter.com/terramarproject>
G+ <https://plus.google.com/104195649525707945586/posts>
PINTEREST <http://pinterest.com/terramarproject/>
INSTAGRAM http://instagram.com/theterramarproject>

From: Mark Cohen <bjaffe@cohengresser.com<mailto:bjaffe@cohengresser.com>>
Date: Thursday, April 3, 2014 21:38 PM
To: gmax <gmax1@ellmax.com<mailto:gmax1@ellmax.com>>
Subject: Re: Daily Mail story

Attachment blank for me as well

On Apr 3, 2014, at 9:36 PM, "G Maxwell" <GMax1@ellmax.com<mailto:GMax1@ellmax.com>> wrote:

Hi there – I can't open any attachment – what are they ref ? Can you see it and what is the story
Thx
G

FACEBOOK <https://www.facebook.com/TerraMarProject>
TWITTER <http://twitter.com/terramarproject>
G+ <https://plus.google.com/104195649525707945586/posts>
PINTEREST <http://pinterest.com/terramarproject/>
INSTAGRAM http://instagram.com/theterramarproject>
PLEDGE <http://theterramarproject.org/#citizenship>
THE DAILY CATCH <http://theterramarproject.org/thedailycatch/


From: Mark Cohen <bjaffe@cohengresser.com<mailto:bjaffe@cohengresser.com>>
Date: Thursday, April 3, 2014 21:30 PM
To: gmax <gmax1@ellmax.com<mailto:gmax1@ellmax.com>>
Subject: Fwd: Daily Mail story




Begin forwarded message:

From: "daniel bates" <danielgbates@gmail.com<mailto:danielgbates@gmail.com>>
To: "Brett D. Jaffe" <bjaffe@cohengresser.com<mailto:bjaffe@cohengresser.com>>
Subject: Daily Mail story


Hello

I am a reporter with the Daily Mail newspaper and have been working on a story with my colleague Guy Adams in London.

I understand that you represent Ghislaine Maxwell.

I have left phone messages with you and Miss Maxwell but have not had any response.

This is to let you know that we are going to report the details of the attached filing which was made in the case of Epstein vs Rothstein in the Palm Beach County Court.

Under the new British Defamation Act we have privilege in the UK to report this filing, so long as we do so accurately and reflect any comment or reaction your client may have to it.

For this reason I wanted to see if your client may wish to offer any comment on the version of events which it depicts.

You can reach me at this email address or 646 812 5081<tel:646%20812%205081>.

My colleague Guy is reached though the office switchboard in the UK which is +44207 938 6000<tel:%2B44207%20938%206000> or guy.adams@dailymail.co.uk<mailto:guy.adams@dailymail.co.uk><mailto:guy.adams@dailymail.co.uk>

Thanks

Daniel[https://mail.google.com/mail/u/0/images/cleardot.gif]
